scripts.prep:yt_source: mkdir yt_source && cp -R node_modules yt_source && cp package.json yt_source && cp package-lock.json yt_source && cp yt_source.js yt_source
scripts.prep:yt_search: mkdir yt_search && cp -R node_modules yt_search && cp package.json yt_search && cp package-lock.json yt_search && cp yt_search.js yt_search
